text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe is repeatedly creating/modifying registry keys under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections, which can be used to manipulate proxy settings, while also making frequent connections to local port 5985 (commonly used by WinRM). This combination of actions is unusual for a typical svchost.exe instance and could indicate an attempt to control network traffic or communicate with a local malicious component.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections",
    "connect",
    "5985"
  ]
}
